text: Ek taraf ghar ki baat ka ghaav, dusri taraf bacche ki school wali pareshaani, dono tumhe ek saath kheench rahe hain.

text: Jo tum mehsoos kar rahe ho woh bahut natural hai, especially jab health needs ke saath school systems support nahi dete. Is rejection ka matlab tum kam parent nahi ho, tumhari value result se alag hai.

speaker: Supporter

text: Metro parents mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - school support na mile toh ghar wale bhi quick judgement kar dete hain. Sirf tumhara nahi hota, lekin log bolte nahi kyunki izzat aur comparison ka pressure bahut rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon? Aaj raat ke liye koi seedha sa raasta batao.

strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 chhote, duty-compatible options dena bina extra bojh ke.
text: Chalo aaj ke liye teen simple options rakhte hain: (1) 5 minute mein ek chhota note likho - school rejection ne kya chot di, bas 3 lines; (2) ghar mein jis par thoda bharosa hai usko sirf itna bolo, 'aaj din heavy tha, mujhe sun lo'; (3) bacche ke documents ka ek folder bana ke kal kis school ko call karna hai uska naam likh do, bas ek naam.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter

text: Jab bahar ke log blame karein aur ghar ka apna bhi ulta bol de, chot do guna mehsoos hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe lagta hai log samjhenge main hi theek baap nahi hoon. Kabhi kabhi darr lagta hai bolun toh pagal hi bol denge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par short restatement dena with soft pause.
text: Tumhe label lagne ka darr itna tez hai ki bolne se pehle hi dil simat jaata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, asli baat yahi hai, main be-baas feel karta hoon. Bacche ke liye daudta hoon phir bhi jagah nahi milti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 mein hidden helplessness aur shame of needing help ko reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bohot phanse hue mehsoos kar rahe ho, aur saath mein yeh sharm bhi ki itni koshish ke baad bhi tumhe support maangna pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, andar se thak gaya hoon. Taane sun sun ke himmat toot jaati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Rural health-disability context normalise karke worth ko outcome se alag karna.
text: Gaon ke mahaul mein disability ko lekar blame aur taana milna bohot common hai, isliye tumhara tootna bilkul samajh aata hai. Iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kam ho, tumhari keemat result ya logon ki baat se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj toh sach mein sharir thanda pad gaya tha. Aisa laga bas yahin baith jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Kisan-parivaar systemic pattern se akelapan kam karna once.
text: Kisan parivaaron mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - bache ki tabiyat aur gaon ki baat ek saath aaye toh aadmi tan se bhi bandh sa pad jata hai. Sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log chup rakhte hain kyunki badnami ka darr chipka rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karun? Aaj ke liye chhota sa seedha rasta chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 duty-fit short options dena.
text: Aaj ke liye teen simple options lo: (1) 5 minute mein kagaz par kal ke do kaam likho - ek bacche ki health ka, ek khet ka; (2) ek bharose ke aadmi ko bol do 'aaj mann bhaari hai, bas sun lo'; (3) jo taana sabse chubha usko ek line mein likh ke fold karke side rakh do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh ho jayega. Do kaam likhne wali baat se dimaag halka lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen option ko one-time stepwise execution mein todna.
text: Pehle ek kagaz lo aur upar 'kal subah' likho. Phir do lines likho - pehla health ka kaam, dusra khet ka kaam. Phir kagaz jeb mein rakh do, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar liya. Saans ab normal lag rahi hai, pehle jaisi ghabrahat kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe dena: disability blame is social pattern, personal fault nahi.
text: Gaon mein disability ko lekar blame culture bohot purana pattern hai, yeh tumhari personal kami ka saboot nahi. Tumhara consistent khada rehna hi bacche ke liye asli support hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke umeed bani. Har baat ko apni galti samajh raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next-steps ke liye 2-3 practical micro options dena.
text: Agle kadam ke liye do chhote options aur: (1) kal jis se baat karoge usse pehle line fix karo - 'mujhe support chahiye, dosh nahi'; (2) medical paper aur school paper alag rakh do; (3) raat ko 2 minute seedhi saans leke so jao.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, line fix karna kaam aayega. Ab clear lag raha ki kaise bolna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Communication clarity ko validate karke confidence badhana.
text: Tumne jo bolne ka tareeka choose kiya hai, woh mature aur sambhala hua hai. Isi se baat tootne ke bajaye jodne ka chance badhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghabrahat kaafi kam ho gayi. Pehle jaisa jamav nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progressive de-escalation ko mirror karke regulation hold karna.
text: Jo sharir aur mann ka jamav tha, woh dheere dheere pighal raha hai aur tum wapas balance mein aa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab lag raha main sambhal lunga. Kal ke do kaam mere paas clear hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final structural normalization for reduced self-blame.
text: Health care, school access aur gaon ki nazar jab ek saath ho, overload hona natural hai. Isko apni nakaami maanna sach ko ulta dekhna hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab theek lag raha. Dimaag mein line ban gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ki self-organization ko reinforce karna.
text: Tumne heavy pal mein bhi apne aap ko organize kiya, yeh bohot badi jeet hai. Isi consistency se cheezein manageable rahengi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya, sunke hi kaafi halka hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Being-heard relief ko mirror karke trust close banana.
text: Tumhare liye sabse bada farq yeh bana ki is dafa dard ko jagah mili.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, mann shaant hai ab. Raat nikal jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure ke liye 2 micro night-routine options dena.
text: Sone se pehle bas do kaam rakho: paani dhire piyo aur kal ki chhoti list ek baar dekh lo. Uske baad phone side rakhke seedha so jao.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, tayyar hoon. Aaj itna kaafi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prepared state and chosen simplicity reinforce karna.
text: Yeh simple plan hi tumhara sahara banega. Tumne aaj khud ko tootne se bachake sambhal liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab sambhal gaya. Kal se ek ek kaam karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Regained agency mirror karna near close.
text: Tumne bojh ke beech bhi zimmedari ka dhaaga pakde rakha, aur isi se raasta banta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Aaj kaafi halka mehsoos kar raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein emotional settling mirror karna.
text: Aaj ki bhaari lehar dheere dheere baith gayi, aur tumne apni pace wapas le li.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F se overwhelm ki bhaari quality mirror karna without rushing.
